initial_entry.name: Graph Context for Claude Code
initial_entry.author: senna-lang
initial_entry.description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Claude Code IDE integration (/ide) for Obsidian. Connects over the lock-file + localhost WebSocket + MCP protocol, then pushes your current selection enriched with expanded graph context: embeds inlined, wikilinks summarized, heading path, and backlinks.

current_entry.author: senna-lang
current_entry.description: Claude Code's /ide, with your knowledge graph attached. Select text and it's pushed to Claude with the graph expanded: embeds inlined, linked notes summarized, heading path and backlinks. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.
